title: La llorona
writer: A. Guzman Aguilera, Carlos Noriega Hope, Fernando de Fuentes
actors: Ramón Pereda, Virginia Zurí, Carlos Orellana
plot: In modern day Mexico, a man on the street is supernaturally killed after hearing the eerie sound of a wailing woman. We then arrive at the manor of an upper class family, who are celebrating their young son's birthday. A mysteriou...
